title: Archived Health Canada - 2015-16 – Departmental Performance Report - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived Health Canada – 2015-16 – Departmental Performance Report
The Honourable Dr. Jane Philpott, P.C, M.P.
© Her Majesty the Queen in Right of Canada, represented by the President of the Treasury Board, 2016
Catalogue No H1-9/6-2016E-PDF ISSN 2368-3554
This document is available on the Treasury Board of Canada Secretariat website
This document is available in alternative formats upon request.
Section III : Analysis of Programs and Internal Services
Typographical error corrected under Program 2.1- Health Products:
In the Budgetary Financial Resources table, the 2015-16 actual spending amount was changed to $145,641,623 as per the amount shown in the Main Estimates and Public Accounts. The 2015-16 difference amount of -2,469,161 remains the same.
Both the English and French HMTL and PDF versions now show the accurate information.
